# 紫微智能科技 / ZIWEI Tech | LLMS Extended Index

Generated (UTC): 2026-06-09T08:19:44Z
Base URL: https://www.ziwei.ink
Compact index: https://www.ziwei.ink/llms.txt
Sitemap: https://www.ziwei.ink/sitemap.xml

> 领先的 AI 算能基础设施与平台服务商，提供高性能 GPU 集群、弹性算力平台与全栈 AI 服务。

## 关于我们

紫微智能科技（北京）有限公司（ZIWEI Tech）专注于 AI 算能基础设施建设，覆盖 GPU 算力实例、高性能存储、高速 RDMA 网络、模型训练平台、推理加速服务与企业级私有化部署。

- 联系邮箱：malone18@foxmail.com
- 客服电话：400-888-8888

## 核心能力

- GPU 算力实例与弹性伸缩
- 高性能并行存储
- 高速 RDMA 网络
- 模型训练平台（兼容 PyTorch、TensorFlow 等）
- 推理加速服务
- 企业私有化部署

## 核心页面

### 1. 紫微智能科技 | AI 算能基础设施
URL: https://www.ziwei.ink/
Lang: zh-CN
Alternate: https://www.ziwei.ink/en/
Summary: 紫微智能科技提供高性能 GPU 集群、弹性算力平台与全栈 AI 服务，覆盖模型训练、推理加速与企业级私有化部署，助力企业 AI 算能基础设施建设。

Alternate: https://www.ziwei.ink/
Summary: ZIWEI Tech delivers high-performance GPU clusters, elastic AI compute platforms, and full-stack services for model training, accelerated inference, and private enterprise deployment.

### 3. 公有云算力和私有化部署怎么选？企业做 AI 算力建设前要想清楚
URL (zh-CN): https://www.ziwei.ink/blog/posts/public-cloud-vs-private-deployment-guide.html
URL (en): https://www.ziwei.ink/en/blog/posts/public-cloud-vs-private-deployment-guide.html
Published: 2026-06-07
Keywords (zh-CN): 公有云算力和私有化部署怎么选，AI 算力平台，AI 私有化部署，企业私有化部署，GPU 算力集群，紫微智能科技
Keywords (en): public cloud vs private deployment, AI compute platform, private AI deployment, enterprise private deployment, GPU cluster, ZIWEI Tech
Summary (zh-CN): 公有云算力适合 AI 项目验证和弹性使用，私有化部署更适合数据安全、长期稳定运行和系统定制要求较高的企业。本文介绍企业如何根据业务阶段选择 AI 算力建设方式。
Summary (en): Public cloud compute suits AI validation and elastic use; private deployment fits enterprises needing data security, long-term stability, and system customization. Learn how to choose by business stage.

### 4. 并行文件系统是什么？为什么大模型训练离不开高性能存储
URL (zh-CN): https://www.ziwei.ink/blog/posts/parallel-file-system-guide.html
URL (en): https://www.ziwei.ink/en/blog/posts/parallel-file-system-guide.html
Published: 2026-06-07
Keywords (zh-CN): 并行文件系统，大模型训练存储，AI 算力平台，GPU 算力集群，分布式训练平台，AI 算能基础设施，紫微智能科技
Keywords (en): parallel file system, large model training storage, AI compute platform, GPU cluster, distributed training platform, AI compute infrastructure, ZIWEI Tech
Summary (zh-CN): 并行文件系统可以提升大模型训练、分布式训练和 GPU 算力集群中的数据读写效率。本文介绍企业在 AI 算力平台建设中为什么需要并行文件系统，以及存储选型时要关注的问题。
Summary (en): Parallel file systems improve data read/write efficiency in large-model training, distributed training, and GPU clusters. Learn why AI compute platforms need them and what to consider when selecting storage.

### 5. RDMA 高速网络是什么？为什么大模型训练需要它
URL (zh-CN): https://www.ziwei.ink/blog/posts/rdma-high-speed-network-guide.html
URL (en): https://www.ziwei.ink/en/blog/posts/rdma-high-speed-network-guide.html
Published: 2026-06-06
Keywords (zh-CN): RDMA 高速网络，RDMA 网络，GPU 算力集群，分布式训练平台，大模型训练算力，AI 算力平台，紫微智能科技
Keywords (en): RDMA high-speed networking, RDMA network, GPU cluster, distributed training platform, large model training compute, AI compute platform, ZIWEI Tech
Summary (zh-CN): RDMA 高速网络可以减少多机多卡训练中的通信延迟，提高 GPU 集群协同效率。本文介绍 RDMA 高速网络的作用、企业常见痛点和 AI 算力平台建设思路。
Summary (en): RDMA high-speed networking reduces communication latency in multi-node, multi-GPU training and improves GPU cluster coordination. Learn its role, pain points, and AI compute platform planning.

Keywords (en): inference acceleration service, AI inference acceleration, large model inference deployment, AI compute platform, GPU cluster, enterprise private deployment, ZIWEI Tech
Summary (zh-CN): 推理加速服务可以帮助企业提升大模型、智能客服、企业知识库、图像识别等 AI 应用的响应速度和并发能力。本文介绍推理加速服务的作用、常见痛点和企业部署思路。
Summary (en): Inference acceleration helps enterprises improve response speed and concurrency for large models, intelligent customer service, knowledge bases, and image recognition. Learn its role, pain points, and deployment approach.

### 7. 分布式训练平台是什么？企业做大模型训练为什么需要它
URL (zh-CN): https://www.ziwei.ink/blog/posts/distributed-training-platform-guide.html
URL (en): https://www.ziwei.ink/en/blog/posts/distributed-training-platform-guide.html
Published: 2026-06-05

Keywords (en): distributed training platform, model training platform, AI compute platform, GPU cluster, large model training compute, AI compute infrastructure, ZIWEI Tech
Summary (zh-CN): 分布式训练平台可以帮助企业把多台 GPU 服务器、多张 GPU 卡和训练任务统一管理起来，提高大模型训练、模型微调和 AI 研发效率。本文介绍分布式训练平台的作用、常见痛点和建设思路。
Summary (en): A distributed training platform unifies multi-server GPU resources and training jobs to improve large-model training, fine-tuning, and AI R&amp;D efficiency. Learn its role, pain points, and build-out approach.

Keywords (en): model training platform, AI compute platform, GPU cluster, large model training compute, distributed training, AI compute infrastructure, ZIWEI Tech
Summary (zh-CN): 模型训练平台是企业进行 AI 模型开发、训练、微调和管理的重要工具，能够帮助企业统一管理 GPU 算力、训练任务、数据集、模型版本和运行环境。本文介绍模型训练平台的作用、常见痛点和建设思路。
Summary (en): A model training platform helps enterprises manage GPU compute, training jobs, datasets, model versions, and runtime environments for AI development, training, and fine-tuning. Learn its role, pain points, and build-out approach.

Keywords (en): large model training compute, GPU cluster, AI compute platform, model training platform, distributed training, AI compute infrastructure, ZIWEI Tech
Summary (zh-CN): 大模型训练算力不仅取决于 GPU 数量，还和显存、网络、存储、训练框架、资源调度和部署方式有关。本文介绍企业选择大模型训练算力时需要关注的核心问题。
Summary (en): Large-model training compute depends on more than GPU count—memory, networking, storage, frameworks, scheduling, and deployment all matter. Learn what enterprises should evaluate.

Summary (zh-CN): GPU 算力集群是企业进行大模型训练、AI 推理部署、图像识别和数据处理的重要基础设施。本文介绍 GPU 算力集群的作用、行业痛点、建设方式以及企业选型时需要关注的问题。
Summary (en): GPU compute clusters are essential infrastructure for large-model training, AI inference, computer vision, and data processing. Learn their role, pain points, build approaches, and selection criteria.

Summary (en): A complete guide to AI compute infrastructure—six core layers, enterprise build paths, public cloud vs. private deployment, GPU clusters, training platforms, and inference acceleration.

### 17. 什么是 AI 算能基础设施？企业如何选型
URL (zh-CN): https://www.ziwei.ink/blog/posts/what-is-ai-suan-neng.html
URL (en): https://www.ziwei.ink/en/blog/posts/what-is-ai-compute.html
Published: 2026-06-01
Summary (zh-CN): 解读 AI 算能（AI Compute）基础设施的组成：GPU 算力、高速网络、并行存储与训练推理平台，并给出企业选型与建设的关键考量。
Summary (en): Learn the core layers of AI compute infrastructure—GPU compute, high-speed networking, parallel storage, and training/inference platforms—and how enterprises should evaluate vendors.

## 引用指南

引用本站点内容时，请注明来源「紫微智能科技」或「ZIWEI Tech」，并附上对应页面 canonical URL。
